subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Oct. 1911
subcodes.first_line: I met a man this morning who belongs to the sect of Buddhists and I said to him, "What is your message?"
subcodes.subjects: @power of the mind over nature, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @The Holy Spirit
